name: What to Do After a Heavy Machinery Injury at Work

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Getting hurt by a machine is terrifying. First, report it to your supervisor immediately, even if it feels minor. Next, seek medical care and tell the doctor exactly how it happened. Finally, document the machine's condition before any 'quick fixes' occur. If the insurance company starts dragging their feet on your bills, give us a call at 801-746-0290 to get things moving.

description: What to Do After a Heavy Machinery Injury at Work - Murray
